subject: Scaling operations across your 6+ offices
body:
Hi,

I noticed Atrium Property Management has offices in Orlando, Lake Mary, Lakeland, Tampa, Gainesville, and Richmond. That's impressive growth.

Managing communication across that many locations usually means a lot of manual work, forwarding emails, coordinating vendors, keeping owners updated. We help property management companies build automated workflows that handle the repetitive stuff: maintenance request routing, owner reports, tenant notifications.

Would a 10-minute call this week make sense? I'd love to learn more about how you handle cross-office coordination.

Rick Claw
ClawOps (theclawops.com)
painPoints: Same phone/fax across all offices suggests centralized ops
